tasks.title: Create monorepo structure
tasks.description: Set up project directory with backend, frontend, and shared configuration folders. Include README and linting configs.
acceptance_criteria: Repository has frontend and backend folders with README
Linters configured for both sides

tasks.title: Configure development scripts
tasks.description: Add npm scripts to start frontend and backend concurrently, install nodemon and react-scripts.
acceptance_criteria: npm run dev starts both servers

tasks.title: Configure database connection
tasks.description: Create env config template and database connection module for Express to connect to PostgreSQL using pg client.
acceptance_criteria: API can connect to database using env vars

tasks.title: Define database schema
tasks.description: Design SQL schema for users and tasks tables based on data model and write migration scripts.
acceptance_criteria: users and tasks tables created with required fields

tasks.title: Create auth controller and routes
tasks.description: Implement register and login handlers with hashing (bcrypt) and JWT issuance.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/auth/register creates user and stores hashed password
POST /api/auth/login returns JWT upon valid credentials

tasks.title: Add auth middleware
tasks.description: Implement JWT verification middleware to protect /api/tasks endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: Protected routes reject unauthorized requests

tasks.title: Implement task routes and controller
tasks.description: Create routes for list, create, update, delete tasks with user scope, status validation, and timestamp handling.
acceptance_criteria: Authenticated user can perform CRUD on tasks
Operations honor user_id scope

tasks.title: Write task service layer
tasks.description: Encapsulate database operations for tasks into service functions used by controllers.
acceptance_criteria: Controllers delegate to service layer

tasks.title: Add request validation
tasks.description: Use middleware to validate request bodies for register/login and task payloads.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid payloads return 4xx responses

tasks.title: Implement centralized error handler
tasks.description: Create express error handler to standardize API error responses.
acceptance_criteria: Errors returned as JSON with status code

tasks.title: Create login and register pages
tasks.description: Implement React components with forms, validation, and API calls for auth endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: Pages interact with backend auth endpoints
Form validations prevent empty submissions

tasks.title: Manage auth state
tasks.description: Implement global auth context or store to keep JWT and user info, protect routes.
acceptance_criteria: Authenticated routes require login

tasks.title: Create task list and card components
tasks.description: Render user tasks retrieved from API, show status and due date, allow filtering by status.
acceptance_criteria: Task list displays tasks from backend
UI highlights status and due date

tasks.title: Implement task CRUD actions
tasks.description: Add UI to create new tasks, update title/description/status, and delete tasks via API.
acceptance_criteria: Users can create, update, delete tasks
Status updates persist in backend

tasks.title: Set up React Router
tasks.description: Configure client-side routing for login, register, and dashboard pages with protected routes.
acceptance_criteria: Routes navigate without reloads
Dashboard is protected

tasks.title: Design basic UI layout
tasks.description: Implement responsive layout with header, footer, and main content area using CSS modules or styled-components.
acceptance_criteria: App displays consistent layout across pages

tasks.title: Write backend integration tests
tasks.description: Create tests for auth and task endpoints using Jest and supertest.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover major success/error cases

tasks.title: Add frontend smoke tests
tasks.description: Implement basic component tests for key UI flows with React Testing Library.
acceptance_criteria: Critical components render without crashing

tasks.title: Document deployment steps
tasks.description: Document environment variables, build commands, and database setup for standard web deployment.
acceptance_criteria: README contains deployment guide

tasks.title: Configure production build scripts
tasks.description: Add build scripts for frontend and backend and describe how to serve static assets from Express.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build prepares production assets
